The '''''Lore Seeker''''' was a reddish-orange [[Jemlaat-class in-system sail yacht|''Jemlaat''-class yacht]] owned by the [[Jedi historian]] [[Tionne Solusar]]. She acquired the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] sometime before [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] from a [[Randoni]] trader on one of her frequent research trips to [[Borgo Prime/Legends|Borgo Prime]], literally for the price of a song. Tionne often took young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] with her on these trips, using it as an opportunity for practical experience.

The yacht was an ancient style, deploying [[Solar sailer/Legends|solar sails]] to harness [[Star/Legends|solar]] wind and power the ship.

==Behind the scenes==
There is some confusion over when Tionne acquired this ship. In [[Firestorm (short story)|''Firestorm'']], set [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], Tionne has a ship by this name. However, in the ''Junior Jedi Knights'' series, set in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], she has only recently acquired the ship.
